tagline: Learn by remixing creativity in motion

designSystem.style: Editorial magazine — warm coral accents on rich dark-brown backgrounds (dark default) or off-white (light mode). Playfair Display serif headings for typographic personality. Overlapping angled cards on Home and Community screens. Column-grid layout with ALL-CAPS overlines, pull quotes, and thick editorial rule borders.

screens: Onboarding (3 slides: Remix to Learn, Temporal Layering, Battle & Collaborate)
Home — Editorial feed with weekly battle banner, overlapping angled featured remix card stack, trending horizontal scroll, recent activity
Create — Clip & Blend Editor with multi-track timeline, Temporal Layering toggle, playhead controls, clip library grid
Explore — Search bar, category pills, Adapted For You section, trending content list
Community — Tabbed: Battles (overlapping angled challenge cards), Leaderboard, Collabs
Profile — User card with stats grid, my remixes list, achievements/badges, settings with theme toggle
keyFeatures: Temporal Layering Mode — multi-track time-sync toggle in editor
Overlapping angled card stacks on Home and Community screens
Dark/Light theme toggle in Profile settings
Working tab navigation: Home, Explore, Create, Community, Profile
Community remix battle cards with entry counts and countdowns
Real-time collab space with member avatars
techStack: React (Babel standalone), Lucide icons CDN, Google Fonts (Playfair Display + Source Sans 3), inline styles only
